playbook.intent: Move from generic 'full-stack dev' to a paid specialist position (e.g. headless-commerce on Shopify Hydrogen, or AI integrations for SMB SaaS) with 2 case studies, a tightened portfolio, and a 30-50% higher day rate.
playbook.scope: Move from generic 'full-stack dev' to a paid specialist position (e.g. headless-commerce on Shopify Hydrogen, or AI integrations for SMB SaaS) with 2 case studies, a tightened portfolio, and a 30-50% higher day rate.

success-criteria.criterion: Audit & pick niche stage complete: Niche shortlist with scores
Re-position + craft proof stage complete: Updated portfolio site
Deepen technical authority stage complete: 8 technical posts
Raise the rate stage complete: New rate quotes

stage.name: Audit & pick niche
stage.intent: Survey past work + market signals; pick one niche with paid demand.

tasks.task: List 5-7 candidate niches you have past relevant work in
Score on demand signal + competition + your appetite
Pick one and commit for 12 weeks

stage.decision-gate: Advance with a single chosen niche, written commitment, and no parallel niches.

stage.name: Re-position + craft proof
stage.intent: Re-brand portfolio + LinkedIn around the niche.

tasks.task: Ship 2 case studies from past work in this niche

stage.decision-gate: Advance when niche is mentioned in every public surface. Audit weekly.

stage.name: Deepen technical authority
stage.intent: Become discoverable as the specialist via durable content.

tasks.task: Publish 1 technical deep-dive per week for 8 weeks
Run 1 podcast / guest post / talk per month
Build a small open-source artifact in the niche

stage.decision-gate: Advance when first inbound lead arrives mentioning the content. Otherwise iterate distribution.

stage.name: Raise the rate
stage.intent: Move day rate +30-50% on new and existing engagements.

tasks.task: Quote new prospects at new rate; track close rate
Send rate-rise notices to top-half existing clients

stage.decision-gate: Advance if ≥50% close-rate holds at new rate over 4 new quotes. Otherwise refine offer, not rate.

extra.value: [Hiring employees or building a team — solo operator throughout, Enterprise procurement processes — SMB / startup buyers only]
[Active freelance practice with at least one paying client, A bookkeeping / time-tracking baseline in place]
[Treating decision_gate as a suggestion — playbook collapses to a checklist if gates are not enforced, Skipping written artifacts because 'it's in my head' — kills traceability and future re-use]
['Did every stage produce a written artifact a stranger could read?', 'Did I actually advance only when the decision_gate criterion was met?']
{human: faion get-content specialty-niche-pivot --format md, agent: faion get-content specialty-niche-pivot --format context, json: faion get-content specialty-niche-pivot --format json}
[{version: 0.1.0, date: 2026-05-20, note: 'Initial draft for F-064 P3 technical-freelancer persona, global angle'}]
